title: pre-compact.sh must output hookSpecificOutput JSON — plain text stdout rejected by CC v2.1.118+
perceive: Claude Code v2.1.118+ validates all hook stdout as JSON. pre-compact.sh using cat << COMPACT heredoc produces plain text output that fails validation on every compaction event.
execute: Replace cat << COMPACT heredoc with python3 block that outputs JSON
Export context vars (TRACK_PATH, TRACK_TURNS, ACTIVE_LUGS, etc.) before python3 block
